name: Aurelius Chronograph
description: Exquisite mechanical movement housed in a hand-polished titanium case. A testament to timeless precision.

name: Celestial Solitaire
description: A flawless 2-carat diamond set in 18k white gold. Engineered to capture the light of a thousand stars.

name: Nocturne Silk Scarf
description: Hand-rolled Italian silk featuring a minimalist geometric pattern inspired by midnight shadows.

name: Lumiere Gold Bracelet
description: Sleek, sculptural 18k yellow gold bracelet designed to be worn as a second skin.

name: Exodus Leather Tote
description: Full-grain calfskin leather, structured yet supple. The ultimate companion for the global voyager.

name: Vanguard Sunglasses
description: Architectural frames carved from solid blocks of acetate. Featuring polarized gradient lenses.

name: Titanium Edge Frame
description: Skeletonized dial revealing the intricate dance of time. Encased in ultra-light aerospace titanium.

name: Obsidian Pearl Necklace
description: Rare Tahitian black pearls, hand-selected for their deep luster and unique overtones.
